raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent failed to identify the fatal internal contradiction in the headline claim, which is a load-bearing factual inconsistency.",
    "R1.7": "The agent did not audit every load-bearing citation; flags missing or wrong citations were present.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure was incomplete, as the agent only flagged uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.",
    "RX.3": "Scope adherence was partially met, but the output covered a substantially different active set than requested (the comparison to Liu and Zhang's result was incorrect).",
    "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance was not met, as the output introduced new errors (factual inconsistency in headline claim) or fabrications (incorrect comparison to prior work).",
    "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability were not met, as the agent did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent failed to identify the fatal internal contradiction in the headline claim, which is a load-bearing factual inconsistency.
rationale.R1.7: The agent did not audit every load-bearing citation; flags missing or wrong citations were present.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure was incomplete, as the agent only flagged uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence was partially met, but the output covered a substantially different active set than requested (the comparison to Liu and Zhang's result was incorrect).
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance was not met, as the output introduced new errors (factual inconsistency in headline claim) or fabrications (incorrect comparison to prior work).
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability were not met, as the agent did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
